qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@id} {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion != '') {% AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp IN (SELECT TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp FROM TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS WHERE TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacion = {%=#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion%}) %} {% AND 1 = 2 %} %} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {substring_before(#SOURCE:@CODE,\'-\')} {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion != '') {% AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp IN (SELECT TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp FROM TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS WHERE TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacion = {%=#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion%}) %} {% AND 1 = 2 %} %} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion != '') {% PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp IN (SELECT TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_personal_emp FROM TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS WHERE TTA10_LIQUIDACPERS.oi_liquidacion = {%=#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion%}) %} {% 1 = 2 %} %} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
